items.name_en: ✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
items.name_cn:
✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 gx tri-color bag renders the classic Monogram pattern in bright colors inspired by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M14194 Black & Color
items.name_cn:
M14194 Black & Color
The 2025 Takashi Murakami collaboration Nano Diane is a mini version of the Diane bag. This bag features natural leather trim, showcasing a unique round flap and a belt-style magnetic closure design, suitable for carrying essentials like a phone. It also comes with a detachable handle and a detachable shoulder strap of adjustable length, allowing for various carrying styles.
19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: ✨M13397 White & Color. Flap Wallet. New LV x TM Portfolio Sarah NM. A wallet paying tribute to Maison luggage, the 'LV × TM Portfolio Sarah NM'. The slightly rectangular shape features calfskin trimming, with gold screws decorating the corners of the front flap. The playful rainbow-colored letter pattern canvas is exclusive to the reissue of the 'Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami' series. The interior features 2 large compartments and multiple pockets with 12 card slots, which is also very attractive. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm.

This handbag reinterprets the brand's classic LV Circle logo with its unique Monogram coated canvas, appearing in a brand-new look. This round handbag features a one-piece handle that creates a simple and elegant appearance, and its compact structure exudes a trendy vibe. The capacity is sufficient to meet your daily needs, perfectly matching your various styles whether carried on the shoulder or in hand.

items.name_en: Size 24-14-5cm
items.name_cn:
Size 24-14-5cm
A favorite small LV crossbody bag perfect for shopping. Very practical with two straps, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody. Many people visit the counter but can't find it, and the small size is the hardest to get. Prices in China have risen again. This bag holds a lot: card holder, compact powder, lipstick, tissues, keys, and even a small power bank with ease. Features a magnetic snap and a small flat inner pocket.

Its authenticity and quality are well-known!
